criteria.criterion: src/index.js exists at project root src/ directory
require('agentic-service') or import 'agentic-service' resolves without error
src/index.js exports startServer, detector, runtime, server
Unit test covers src/index.js export validation
README.md all port references are 1234 (no localhost:3000)
npm start defaults to port 1234 (bin/agentic-service.js --port default is 1234)
Admin UI Vue 3 SPA source exists at src/ui/admin/ with App.vue, main.js, index.html
Admin UI has 5 components: SystemStatus, DeviceList, ConfigPanel, HardwarePanel, LogViewer
App.vue polls /api/status every 5 seconds with onUnmounted clearInterval cleanup
ConfigPanel fetches GET /api/config and saves via PUT /api/config
Admin UI served at /admin and / via express.static in api.js
Built dist/admin/index.html exists with bundled JS assets
npm run build script builds admin UI (cd src/ui/admin && npm install && npm run build)
Test files for admin UI exist (m23-app-vue.test.js, admin-panel.test.js, m20-admin-ui.test.js)
